example: Most students now read digital books on their tablets.
exampleCn: 现在大多数学生在平板电脑上阅读数字图书。

example: The country is still dependent on imported oil.
exampleCn: 这个国家仍然依赖进口石油。

example: He moved to Paris and subsequently became a famous painter.
exampleCn: 他搬到巴黎，后来成为了著名画家。

example: She made a high bid for the old painting.
exampleCn: 她对那幅古画出了一个高价。

example: The company plans rapid expansion into Asian markets.
exampleCn: 公司计划迅速向亚洲市场扩张。

example: He was a radical who demanded immediate political change.
exampleCn: 他是一名要求立即进行政治变革的激进分子。

example: Stress can cause serious psychological problems over time.
exampleCn: 长期的压力会导致严重的心理问题。

example: The ratio of students to teachers here is ten to one.
exampleCn: 这里学生与教师的比例是十比一。

example: The journey takes approximately two hours by train.
exampleCn: 乘火车旅程大约需要两个小时。

example: The army tested a new missile over the ocean.
exampleCn: 军队在海上试射了一枚新型导弹。

example: The room was in complete disorder after the party.
exampleCn: 聚会过后房间里一片混乱。

example: A copper wire connects the speaker to the radio.
exampleCn: 一根铜线把扬声器连接到收音机上。

example: He gave the police a false name and address.
exampleCn: 他向警方提供了虚假的姓名和地址。

example: Her skin is very sensitive to strong sunlight.
exampleCn: 她的皮肤对强烈的阳光非常敏感。

example: Public transportation in this city is cheap and convenient.
exampleCn: 这座城市的公共交通便宜又方便。

example: Jerusalem is a holy city for several religions.
exampleCn: 耶路撒冷是多个宗教共同的圣城。

example: He has a tendency to talk too much when nervous.
exampleCn: 他紧张的时候往往会说太多话。

example: The queen rested in her private chamber upstairs.
exampleCn: 女王在楼上的私人寝室里休息。

example: It is a great honour to receive this award tonight.
exampleCn: 今晚获得这个奖项是莫大的荣誉。

example: You must pay a deposit before renting the apartment.
exampleCn: 租这套公寓之前你必须支付定金。

example: The rent for this small flat is too high.

example: The necklace is made of pure silver.
exampleCn: 这条项链是纯银做的。

example: She took her sick child to the local clinic.
exampleCn: 她带生病的孩子去了当地的诊所。

example: The veteran told us stories about the war.
exampleCn: 这位老兵给我们讲述战争的故事。

example: Lightning is a natural phenomenon that scientists still study.
exampleCn: 闪电是科学家们仍在研究的一种自然现象。

example: I always feel nervous before an important exam.
exampleCn: 重要考试前我总是感到紧张。

example: The whole town celebrates the harvest festival with music.
exampleCn: 全镇人用音乐庆祝丰收节。

example: They started the match with a toss of a coin.

example: A teaching qualification is required for this job.
exampleCn: 这份工作需要教师资格。

example: The hospital lacks adequate supplies of clean water.

example: Many villagers pray at the temple every morning.
exampleCn: 许多村民每天早上在寺庙里祈祷。

example: She sliced a fresh tomato for the salad.
exampleCn: 她切了一个新鲜的西红柿做沙拉。

example: The patient made a rapid recovery after the surgery.
exampleCn: 病人手术后迅速康复。

example: The government must reduce the budget deficit this year.
exampleCn: 政府今年必须削减预算赤字。

example: Each radio station broadcasts at a fixed frequency.
exampleCn: 每个电台都以固定的频率广播。

example: Please turn off all electronic devices during takeoff.
exampleCn: 起飞期间请关闭所有电子设备。

example: Britain was a close ally of France during the war.
exampleCn: 战争期间英国是法国的亲密盟友。

example: The cake is a mixture of flour, eggs, and sugar.
exampleCn: 这个蛋糕是面粉、鸡蛋和糖的混合物。

example: I could not resist buying another piece of cake.
exampleCn: 我忍不住又买了一块蛋糕。

example: We must confront these problems instead of avoiding them.
exampleCn: 我们必须面对这些问题，而不是回避它们。

example: It is surprising how quickly children learn new languages.
exampleCn: 孩子们学习新语言的速度之快令人惊讶。

example: The little boy got a new toy for his birthday.
exampleCn: 小男孩生日时得到了一个新玩具。

example: The king held absolute power over his people.

example: Please measure each dimension of the box carefully.

example: He is a friendly fellow who helps everyone.

example: Morning exercise is part of my daily routine.
exampleCn: 晨练是我每天例行活动的一部分。

example: The rough surface of the wood needs polishing.

example: The baby's skin feels soft and smooth.
exampleCn: 婴儿的皮肤摸起来又软又滑。

example: They had lunch at a nearby restaurant.

example: She made remarkable progress in just three months.

example: Teenagers often face strong pressure from their peer group.

example: All personnel must wear identification badges at work.
exampleCn: 所有工作人员上班时必须佩戴工作证。

example: The maximum speed on this road is sixty kilometers.

example: They bought new furniture for the living room.

example: Please sign your name in the hotel register.

example: The country has strict laws on immigration.
exampleCn: 这个国家有严格的移民法律。

example: After retirement, he spends his days fishing and reading.
exampleCn: 退休后，他每天钓鱼和读书。

example: The duke owned a large castle in the north.

example: Water flows through the pipe into the garden.
exampleCn: 水通过管道流进花园。

example: The mere thought of flying makes her afraid.

example: The shy teenager loves playing basketball after school.

example: The report gives a comprehensive view of the problem.

example: The national flag waves above the government building.

example: She spoke in a whisper so nobody could hear.

example: The landlord raised the rent again this year.
exampleCn: 房东今年又涨了房租。

example: Farmers grow corn in these wide fields.

example: My throat hurts when I swallow food.
exampleCn: 我吞咽食物时喉咙疼。

example: The car dealer offered us a good discount.
exampleCn: 汽车经销商给了我们不错的折扣。

example: She is a junior manager in the sales department.
exampleCn: 她是销售部的一名初级经理。

example: They sat on a wooden bench in the park.
exampleCn: 他们坐在公园的木制长椅上。

example: He hit the ball with a powerful swing of the bat.

example: She earns a good salary as a software engineer.

example: The cold wind turned her cheek bright red.
exampleCn: 寒风把她的脸颊吹得通红。

example: An international observer watched the election closely.

example: The students solved a difficult equation in class.
exampleCn: 学生们在课堂上解出了一个很难的方程。

example: The wheat crop was excellent this year.
exampleCn: 今年的小麦收成非常好。

example: We walked at a slow pace along the beach.
exampleCn: 我们以缓慢的步伐沿着海滩散步。

example: She worked hard to overcome her fear of heights.
exampleCn: 她努力克服自己的恐高心理。

example: Parents expect their children to behave well in public.
exampleCn: 父母希望孩子在公共场合举止得体。

example: He reached the rank of general at forty.
exampleCn: 他四十岁时升到了将军军衔。

example: We waited for her at the main entrance.

example: Exams cause great anxiety for many students.
exampleCn: 考试让许多学生感到十分焦虑。

example: You need permission from the teacher to leave early.

example: The factory installed a new electric motor yesterday.
exampleCn: 工厂昨天安装了一台新电动机。

example: He translated the poem literally, word by word.
exampleCn: 他逐字逐句地直译了那首诗。

example: She gave her mother a warm embrace at the airport.
exampleCn: 她在机场热情地拥抱了母亲。

example: The bank keeps a large reserve of cash.

example: Heat some oil in the pan before adding the eggs.
exampleCn: 加鸡蛋之前先在平锅里热一些油。

example: The company hired a consultant to improve its management.

example: His parents give him a weekly allowance for snacks.

example: They took out a mortgage to buy their first house.

example: A soft red carpet covers the bedroom floor.

example: The mayor promised to build more public parks.
exampleCn: 市长承诺修建更多的公园。

example: Good judgement comes from years of experience.
exampleCn: 良好的判断力来自多年的经验。

example: This question is beyond the scope of our discussion.

example: She wore a dress of pale pink to the party.

example: The train will arrive at platform six shortly.
exampleCn: 火车很快将到达六号站台。

example: They signed a historic agreement to end the war.

example: Please read the first paragraph of the article aloud.

example: My grandmother tells wonderful stories about her childhood.

example: A cricket sang loudly in the quiet garden.

example: She successfully completed the marathon in four hours.

example: Dogs can detect smells that humans cannot notice.

example: You cannot use the photos without the owner's consent.

example: Women comprise more than half of the workforce here.

example: This soup recipe has been in our family for years.
exampleCn: 这道汤的食谱在我们家流传多年。

example: Children learn elementary mathematics in primary school.

example: She won a major literary prize for her novel.

example: The dog becomes aggressive when strangers approach the gate.

example: We enjoyed a wonderful concert at the city hall.

example: He plays the guitar every evening after dinner.

example: Save the files to an external disk for backup.

example: The desert is famous for its extreme heat in summer.
exampleCn: 这片沙漠以夏季的极端高温而闻名。

example: He decided to quit his job and travel abroad.

example: Your support has greatly improved our work.

example: The thief spent two years in jail for stealing.

example: Listening to music helps me relax after work.

example: The library has a rare first edition of the novel.

example: The story tells of a kind giant living in the hills.

example: A broken circuit caused the lights to go out.

example: The final match was the most exciting game this year.

example: She loves listening to pop music on the radio.

example: Never mix this chemical with water at home.
exampleCn: 千万不要在家里把这种化学药品与水混合。

example: It is easy to criticize others but hard to improve yourself.

example: The two brothers differ greatly in character.
exampleCn: 这两兄弟的性格大不相同。

example: It was stupid of me to forget the keys again.

example: She found a beautiful shell on the beach.
exampleCn: 她在海滩上捡到一个漂亮的贝壳。

example: The team suffered a painful defeat in the final.

example: Fuel consumption rises sharply during the cold winter.

example: She enjoys listening to classical music while reading.

example: The peasant worked in the fields from dawn to dusk.

example: His family comes from a small province in the south.
exampleCn: 他的家人来自南方的一个小省份。

example: After a short pause, she continued her speech.
exampleCn: 短暂停顿之后，她继续演讲。

example: Chop the onion finely before adding the meat.
exampleCn: 加肉之前先把洋葱切碎。

example: The acquisition of the small company took six months.

example: The socialist gave a speech about workers' rights.

example: This brand of coffee is popular among young people.

example: I assure you that everything will be ready on time.
exampleCn: 我向你保证一切都会按时准备好。

example: This tool has great utility in everyday repairs.

example: His rude remark made everyone at the table uncomfortable.

example: The staff were very helpful when we lost our luggage.

example: The new highway connects the two major cities.
exampleCn: 这条新公路连接了两座大城市。

example: The new drug passed all its clinical trials.
exampleCn: 这种新药通过了所有临床试验。

example: Clean water is essential for human survival.
exampleCn: 清洁的水对人类生存至关重要。

example: She washed the dishes in the kitchen sink.
exampleCn: 她在厨房的水槽里洗碗。

example: The factory workshop produces car parts every day.
exampleCn: 这个工厂车间每天生产汽车零件。

example: The professor gave an interesting lecture on modern history.
exampleCn: 教授作了一场关于现代史的有趣演讲。

example: Fresh garlic is the key ingredient in this dish.
exampleCn: 新鲜大蒜是这道菜的关键配料。

example: He tied the young tree to a wooden stake.
exampleCn: 他把小树绑在一根木桩上。

example: Please write your name and occupation on this form.
exampleCn: 请在这张表格上写下姓名和职业。

example: This cloth is made from natural fiber.
exampleCn: 这种布料由天然纤维制成。

example: He helped the child mount the gentle old horse.

example: Be careful not to snap the thin branch.

example: Students must memorize this formula for the physics exam.

example: Her ultimate goal is to become a doctor.
exampleCn: 她的最终目标是成为一名医生。

example: The latest statistics show that unemployment is falling.
exampleCn: 最新的统计数据显示失业率正在下降。

example: The dog wagged its tail when it saw me.
exampleCn: 狗看到我时摇着尾巴。

example: A broken gear stopped the old machine completely.

example: They plan to found a new school for poor children.

example: Language is often a barrier for new immigrants.

example: There is a distinct difference between the two plans.

example: The manager will assign tasks to each team member.
exampleCn: 经理将给每个团队成员分配任务。

example: The workers received compensation for the factory accident.
exampleCn: 工人们因工厂事故获得了赔偿金。

example: The poet wrote beautiful verses about the sea.
exampleCn: 这位诗人写下了关于大海的优美诗句。

example: A gang of thieves robbed the bank last night.
exampleCn: 一伙窃贼昨晚抢劫了银行。

example: This novel is a classic of modern literature.

example: Check the label before washing the new shirt.
exampleCn: 洗这件新衬衫之前先看看标签。

exampleCn: 他把每月收入的一半存起来以备将来。

example: The storm caused widespread damage across the region.
exampleCn: 暴风雨在整个地区造成了大范围的破坏。

example: We spent our summer vacation by the seaside.
exampleCn: 我们在海边度过了暑假。

example: John and Mary scored ninety and eighty points respectively.
exampleCn: 约翰和玛丽分别得了九十分和八十分。

example: She is a strong advocate of free education for all.
exampleCn: 她是全民免费教育的坚定倡导者。

example: He showed me the first draft of his speech.
exampleCn: 他给我看了他演讲稿的初稿。

example: She has an extraordinary talent for learning languages.
exampleCn: 她有非凡的语言学习天赋。

example: Grandma believed good people go to heaven after death.
exampleCn: 奶奶相信好人死后会上天堂。

example: He made a fortune by selling computer software.
exampleCn: 他靠卖电脑软件发了大财。

example: The fans yell with joy whenever their team scores.
exampleCn: 每当球队得分，球迷们都高声欢呼。

example: His wife is pregnant with their second child.
exampleCn: 他的妻子怀着他们的第二个孩子。

example: She was anxious about her son's safety abroad.
exampleCn: 她为儿子在国外的安全感到忧虑。

example: We could see distant mountains from the hotel window.
exampleCn: 从酒店的窗口我们能看到远处的群山。

example: The satellite sends weather pictures back to Earth.
exampleCn: 这颗卫星把气象图像传回地球。

example: He was conscious of someone watching him closely.
exampleCn: 他意识到有人在密切注视着他。

example: The fisherman packed his tackle before dawn.
exampleCn: 渔夫在天亮前收拾好了他的渔具。

example: The floor needs a good sweep before the guests arrive.
exampleCn: 客人来之前，地板需要好好打扫一下。

example: Prices remained stable throughout the whole year.
exampleCn: 全年物价保持稳定。

example: A beautiful lamp hangs from the ceiling.
exampleCn: 一盏漂亮的灯悬挂在天花板上。

example: Music is a universal language that everyone understands.
exampleCn: 音乐是人人都懂的通用语言。

example: I have a strong preference for tea over coffee.
exampleCn: 比起咖啡，我更偏爱茶。

example: The dancer ended her performance with a graceful spin.
exampleCn: 舞者以一个优雅的旋转结束了表演。

example: Press the red button to start the machine.
exampleCn: 按下红色按钮启动机器。

example: We ordered a super size pizza for the party.
exampleCn: 我们为聚会订了一个特大号披萨。

example: The roof has a steep pitch to shed the snow.
exampleCn: 屋顶的坡度很陡，便于积雪滑落。

example: Farmers expect a high yield of rice this autumn.
exampleCn: 农民们期待今年秋天水稻获得高产。

example: A white fence surrounds the small garden.
exampleCn: 一道白色的栅栏围着这个小花园。

example: The artist painted a portrait of the old king.
exampleCn: 画家为老国王画了一幅肖像。

example: Dark clouds are a clear indication of coming rain.
exampleCn: 乌云是即将下雨的明显迹象。

example: The repair will cost roughly two hundred dollars.
exampleCn: 修理费大概要两百美元。

example: He bought a bunch of fresh flowers for his mother.
exampleCn: 他给母亲买了一束鲜花。

example: The manager asked several questions concerning the new project.
exampleCn: 经理问了几个关于新项目的问题。

example: There was an awful accident on the highway last night.
exampleCn: 昨晚公路上发生了一起可怕的事故。

example: The company faces a lawsuit over its faulty products.
exampleCn: 该公司因产品缺陷面临一场诉讼。

example: Her testimony helped the court find the truth.
exampleCn: 她的证言帮助法庭查明了真相。

example: Volunteers distribute food to homeless people every weekend.
exampleCn: 志愿者每个周末向无家可归者分发食物。

example: Higher costs inevitably lead to higher prices.
exampleCn: 成本上升不可避免地导致价格上涨。

example: Caring for five children was a heavy burden for her.
exampleCn: 照顾五个孩子对她来说是沉重的负担。

example: How did your parents react to the good news?
exampleCn: 你父母对这个好消息有什么反应？

example: Accurate measurement is essential in scientific experiments.
exampleCn: 精确的测量在科学实验中至关重要。

example: The wedding ceremony will be held in the garden.
exampleCn: 婚礼仪式将在花园里举行。

example: The two brothers share ownership of the family farm.
exampleCn: 兄弟俩共同拥有家庭农场的所有权。

example: Parents should communicate openly with their children.
exampleCn: 父母应该与孩子坦诚交流。

example: Her profile looked beautiful in the soft evening light.
exampleCn: 在柔和的暮色中，她的侧影显得很美。

example: The students showed great enthusiasm for the science project.
exampleCn: 学生们对这个科学项目表现出极大的热情。

example: The two sides agreed to cease fighting at midnight.
exampleCn: 双方同意在午夜停止战斗。

example: Experts disagree about the causes of the disease.
exampleCn: 专家们对这种疾病的成因看法不一。

example: The new museum building is truly impressive.
exampleCn: 新的博物馆大楼确实令人印象深刻。

example: She finished the difficult task with great satisfaction.
exampleCn: 她非常满意地完成了这项艰巨的任务。

example: They live in a remote village far from the city.
exampleCn: 他们住在一个远离城市的偏僻村庄。

example: We stayed at a beach resort for our holiday.
exampleCn: 我们度假时住在一个海滨度假村。

example: You must pass three exams to qualify as a lawyer.
exampleCn: 你必须通过三门考试才能取得律师资格。

example: The flood caused terrible destruction in the valley.
exampleCn: 洪水给山谷造成了可怕的破坏。

example: The doctor examined the muscle tissue under a microscope.
exampleCn: 医生在显微镜下检查肌肉组织。

example: There will be a short interval between the two acts.
exampleCn: 两幕之间会有短暂的间歇。

example: The dogs pant heavily in the summer heat.
exampleCn: 狗在夏日的酷热中大口喘气。

example: The princess waved to the crowd from the palace balcony.
exampleCn: 公主在宫殿阳台上向人群挥手。

example: Never open the door to a stranger at night.
exampleCn: 晚上千万不要给陌生人开门。

example: The sudden fire alarm caused great confusion in the building.
exampleCn: 突然响起的火警在大楼里造成了极大的混乱。
